accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: Account ID if the user is authenticated. Leave empty for guests.

email.title: Email
email.description: Guest email for ticket delivery if the user is not authenticated.

eventoId.title: ID Evento
eventoId.description: The targeted event for the reservation.

metodoPagamento.title: Metodo de Pagamento
metodoPagamento.description: The chosen payment method such as MBWay or Card.

nomeCompleto.title: Nome
nomeCompleto.description: Guest full name if the user is not authenticated.
